title: [3300mAh] TLi028C7 Replacement Battery, High Capacity Compatible with Alcatel per 1A 1B Year 2020 Phone 5002H Tracfone A3 A509DL
features: 📲>>Compatible Models:This Battery Compatible with Per 1A 1B Year 2020 Phone 5002H Tracfone A3 A509DL. Battery Model TLi028C7. Not applicable to TLi017D1 battery. Please confirm your Phone Model before you order.

📲>>Quality Certification: Each battery is manufactured and tested under strict quality control standards. The built-in intelligent microchip can protect your Mobile Phone from the effects of short circuits, overvoltage, overcurrent, overcharging, and high temperature.

📲>>Important Attention:This battery may be sent out with little power or no power. If the phone cannot turn on, please make sure it is fully charged first. It is recommended to fully drain and fully charge the battery, especially during the first 3 charging and discharging cycles.
📲>>New Upgrade High Capacity:This TLi028C7 replacement battery uses advanced .Upgrade 0 Cycle high capacity [3300mAh], providing more power for your phone and extending its battery life.

📲>>High-Quality After-sales:Customer satisfaction is our important task. If you have questions about our products or are not satisfied with the products, please through the "Contact Seller" function to contact our friendly customer service, We will contact you within 24 hours to solve your problem quickly! You can buy our products with confidence without worrying about after-sales problems.
